DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Electrical system S / ABS control - Initial state (control application inactive)(00h)
lists.2: Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 2(02h)
lists.3: Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 3(03h)
lists.4: Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 4(04h)
lists.9: Electrically controlled S / ABS control -CAN input signal abnormality detection(09h)

lists.1: (TBD)S/ABS control - ESA control application operation demand(01h)

lists.2: EVC Not available as an actuator

lists.0: No warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(00h)
lists.1: Warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(01h)

lists.9: VMC Right revolution operation display On
